name: auralink-ai
description: Run backend, publishing, and frontend for the master flow

scripts.start: npm run inject && npx concurrently -n be,pub,fe -c blue,green,magenta "cd backend && python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "cd publishing && node src/index.js" "cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 PUBLISHING_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production npm run dev:no-open"
